# Maths with Shraddha — AI Context File (llms.txt)

> Maths with Shraddha is a premium mathematics coaching institute based in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India, led by Shraddha Ma'am. Specialising in Grades 1–10, the institute offers concept-based learning, Olympiad preparation, and Mental Maths training, delivered both online and offline.

## About

- **Founded by:** Shraddha Ma'am
- **Location:** Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- **Contact:** hello@mathswithshraddha.com | +91 99691 74811
- **Website:** https://mathswithshraddha.com

## Programs Offered

- **Regular Maths:** Academic excellence and school curriculum support for Grades 1–10
- **Olympiad Preparation:** Advanced concepts for SOF, SASMO, IPM, and other competitive mathematics exams
- **Mental Maths:** Speed, accuracy, and cognitive development training

## Exams Covered

- [SOF Maths Olympiad](https://mathswithshraddha.com/exams/sof)
- [SASMO](https://mathswithshraddha.com/exams/sasmo)
- [IPM Olympiad](https://mathswithshraddha.com/exams/ipm)
- [Mental Maths](https://mathswithshraddha.com/exams/mental-maths)
